summary: W866 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while composing W845 iso-closure direct-source data with the W865 stable-ExactAt route. From one W845 datum, W866 checks direct bounded left calculus through the W844/W865 concrete-leaves target ExactAt route and obtains the bounded derived infinity-category package through W844/W865. Product success remains false because concrete W845 fields, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W866 replaces the W865 W844 target-isomorphism boundary with W845 iso-closure direct-source data, but still requires concrete W845 fields.
Concrete W845 data still includes W735 closed-map or closed-embedding exact inputs and a W651 exact-acyclic iso-closure strict realization payload; those fields are not yet fully instantiated.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete W845 iso-closure direct-source data, especially the W735 exact inputs or W651 iso-closure strict realization payload now isolated by W866.
Connect the resulting route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
